[event]
# Urn
type=event
location=15,13,1,1
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
loot=loot/il_chest_common.txt
loot_count=1
mapmod=object,15,13,269
repeat=false
soundfx=soundfx/inventory/inventory_object.ogg
tooltip=Urn

[enemy]
type=enemy
location=6,6,16,16
category=il_common
number=3,5
spawn_level=hero_level,1
